prompt:
Screenshot of a macOS desktop application called ImageView. The background shows a dark image gallery grid with thumbnail photos arranged in rows — various AI-generated artwork, illustrations, and photographs on a #1a1b26 dark background. A semi-transparent dark overlay dims the gallery.

In the center, a floating modal dialog (520px wide, ~600px tall) with rounded corners and a subtle border (#3b4261). The modal background is #24283b.

Modal header: 'Settings' text in #c0caf5, a small X close button on the right.

GENERAL section (uppercase #565f89 label):
Four rows, each with label text (#c0caf5) on left and toggle on right:
- 'Close to tray' — green (#9ece6a) pill toggle showing ON
- 'Confirm before Trash' — green pill toggle showing ON
- 'Auto-purge missing files' — green pill toggle showing ON
- 'HTTP server' — gray pill toggle showing OFF, with a small text input '9847' next to it

Thin separator line (#3b4261).

API KEYS section (uppercase #565f89 label):
Three rows for API providers:
- 'OpenAI' label, password input field with dots (masked key), small green dot + 'Connected' in #9ece6a
- 'Google' label, password input field with dots (masked key), small green dot + 'Connected' in #9ece6a
- 'OpenRouter' label, empty password input with placeholder 'Enter API key...', no status
Below the rows: small lock icon + 'Stored securely in system keychain' in #565f89 dim text

Thin separator line.

ACCESS TOKENS section (uppercase #565f89 label, '+ Create' button with #7aa2f7 blue text on right):
Two token rows on #1a1b26 darker cards:
- 'Claude Code' name, purple (#bb9af7) 'admin' badge pill, '2h ago' in dim, 'Rotate' and 'Revoke' outline buttons
- 'Cursor' name, blue (#7aa2f7) 'viewer' badge pill, '5d ago' in dim, 'Rotate' and 'Revoke' outline buttons

Thin separator line.

CLAUDE CODE CONFIG section (uppercase #565f89 label, 'Copy' button on right):
Dark code block (#1a1b26) with monospace JSON showing mcpServers imageview config.

The overall aesthetic is a professional macOS developer tool. Clean, minimal, tight spacing. 13px system font. No decorative elements. Pixel-perfect UI rendering.
